headline: Sanofi Wins EU Nod for Subcutaneous Sarclisa in Multiple Myeloma
summary: SNY wins EU approval for a subcutaneous Sarclisa option in multiple myeloma, offering faster administration and flexible delivery methods.

headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Launches Investigating Myeloma, Multiple Myeloma Awareness Campaign, In Partnership With Mariska Hargitay
summary: Multiple myeloma is a complex and incurable blood cancer, characterized by a relentless cycle of relapse and progressively shorter remissionsCampaign highlights unmet needs in myeloma and new science like CELMoD research
